programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi

programme.title: Anupamaa

programme.desc: S1 E188 Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.

programme.desc: S1 E129 Shivprasad lives a quiet life as a devoted husband and father, but he harbors a massive secret. Unknown to his family, he is also Parshuram, a highly skilled spy on dangerous missions.
programme.title: Mr & Mrs Parshuram

programme.desc: S1 E12 Single mother Dr. Noyonika helps pop star sensation Ishaan regain his voice, to the delight of her daughter. But tensions rise as they fall for each other.
programme.title: Sairaab

programme.desc: S1 E55 A reserved businessman who avoids romance crosses paths with an artist haunted by a bitter past, leaving the prospect of a budding romance hanging in the balance.
programme.title: Oh Humnava Tum Dena Saath Mera

programme.desc: S1 E822 Though they get off to a bad start, an aspirational Saili and an unmotivated Sachin end up getting married. Saili then tries to turn her husband into a competent person.
programme.title: Udne Ki Aasha

programme.desc: S1 E5192 Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.desc: S1 E2048 Anupamaa sacrifices her personal ambitions to dedicate her life to her family. However, she eventually decides to live on her own terms after failing to receive credit for her many trials.
programme.title: Anupamaa

programme.title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi

programme.title: Saath Nibhaana Saathiya
